name: Stuffed Pasta Shells
recipeIngredient: 10 oz frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
12 oz jumbo pasta shells, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheeses and spinach; stuff into the shells.
2. Arrange in a greased 13x9x2 inch baking dish.
3. Pour the spaghetti sauce over the shells.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until heated through.
